commands.cmd: read-only profile settings privacy, optional-input, unit, conflict and truthful-estimator boundary review

summary: Approved a schema-free private profile-settings UI over the existing authorized optimistic PATCH contract.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM performed the same read-only review as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: Personalized reference and energy estimates require a separate sourced/reviewed package after the settings UI.
